title: Spicy Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty North African stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and dried fruits.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, cumin, cayenne pepper, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the dates, pine nuts, and 2 cups of water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
